risk_title: Project Implementation Suspension Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) and Global Partnership for Education (GPE) funding have been cancelled, and IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) and the Global Partnership for Education (GPE) fund in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High, indicating persistent fragility in the government structures necessary for project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High [at Approval], High [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]

risk_title: Deteriorating Out-of-School Children Numbers in Conflict-Affected Provinces
risk_summary: Out-of-school children in selected provinces have increased significantly from baseline (2,289,880 to 2,864,608), suggesting conflict and instability are driving children away from education, particularly girls (1,387,717 to 1,628,133).
evidence_quote: Out of school children in selected provinces [Baseline: 2,289,880, Actual (Current): 2,864,608]; out of school children in selected provinces, female [Baseline: 1,387,717, Actual (Current): 1,628,133]

risk_title: Declining School Attendance in Conflict-Affected Provinces
risk_summary: Students attending school regularly have declined from baseline (4,318,473 to 4,009,096), with female attendance also declining (1,616,799 to 1,468,720), indicating conflict and insecurity are disrupting education access.
evidence_quote: Students attending school regularly in selected provinces [Baseline: 4,318,473, Actual (Current): 4,009,096]; Students attending school regularly in selected provinces, female [Baseline: 1,616,799, Actual (Current): 1,468,720]

risk_title: Stalled Teacher Training and Capacity Building Due to Instability
risk_summary: Multiple teacher training and capacity-building indicators show zero progress (Early Grade Reading training: 0 of 20,000 target; Subject Teacher Training evaluation: no data collection), indicating conflict has halted critical education quality interventions.
evidence_quote: Grades 1 to 3 teachers and head masters trained in Early Grade Reading [Baseline: 0.00, Actual (Current): 0.00, End Target: 20,000.00]; Evaluation of Subject Teacher Training [Baseline: No data collection conducted, Actual (Current): No data collection conducted]
